name: mcp-wireshark
description: MCP server for Wireshark/tshark integration — capture live traffic, analyze .pcap files, apply display filters, follow TCP/UDP streams, and export to JSON.

tools.name: check_installation
tools.description: Check if Wireshark/tshark is installed and return version info

tools.name: list_interfaces
tools.description: List all available network interfaces for packet capture

tools.name: live_capture
tools.description: Capture live network traffic from a specified interface

tools.name: read_pcap
tools.description: Read and analyze packets from a .pcap or .pcapng file

tools.name: display_filter
tools.description: Apply a Wireshark display filter to a pcap file

tools.name: summarize_pcap
tools.description: Get a high-level summary of a pcap file: packet count, duration, top protocols, top talkers

tools.name: stats_by_proto
tools.description: Generate protocol hierarchy statistics from a pcap file

tools.name: follow_tcp
tools.description: Follow a TCP stream and extract payload data

tools.name: follow_udp
tools.description: Follow a UDP stream and extract payload data

tools.name: export_json
tools.description: Export packets from a pcap file to JSON format
